turns.user_message: I used to feel so much more confident about things. Now I just feel kind of useless and out of place.
That feeling of being useless just won't go away, no matter what I do. I feel like I've completely lost my spark.
I don't even recognize the person I've become, and I'm sure no one else does either. I'm just a hollow version of who I was.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
